name: Murtaza Nurbhai
content: The products are always fresh. Very high standards - good hygiene and tasty baked items. Love the customer service and the meat pies are my favourite. By far the best bakery in Nakuru

name: Alice Rwamba Githinji
content: Delivery on time! Very fresh cakes! Anytime, any day! My preferred bakers! Keep up the good work!

name: Shoeb Janoowalla
content: All products made from finest ingredients and expert baker to the delight of customers

name: Rakel Levi
content: Ensure you have loose change. If you walk in there without loose cash they won't serve your because they are too lazy to look for change. I was very disappointed yet I wanted the cakes.
